text_block_list.text:
On the day of Biwa Hayahide's race, I take Narita Brian to the
Hanshin Racecourse to see her sister's debut.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You'd better have been telling the truth this morning.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Don't play dumb. I won't let you back out of your promise after
coming this far.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch... You just don't quit! Why in the world would I go with you?
choice_data_list: I really think you need to see this!
I really think you need to see this!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Fine, but you'll promise to never come sniffing around me again.
Wait, that's not enough—turn in your trainer's badge too!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hmm.
Well, she's here, so it worked at least. All that's left is...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's time for the Junior Make Debut! Who will shine as our victor
today?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: She's next.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: (Are you watching, Brian?)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(You've always loved running more than anyone. It's only natural for
you to crave a worthy opponent.)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(But you're simply too talented, so your hopes were always dashed...
That's why you're so quick to give up on others.)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(But you must learn, Brian, that a worthy opponent can come from
anywhere—even from the depths of failure!)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide's in the lead! She's way ahead of the pack! She's two,
no, three lengths—wait, this is turning into a landslide victory!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
What is this? Since when could she run like that? It's as if she's on the
hunt and all she can see is the finish line...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Sis! Why have you been hiding that amazing skill all this time?! Why
haven't you ever asked me to race you?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I see you made it, Brian... And you too.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Let's go over to the stands, shall we?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huh? I'm trying to talk to you here—
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! What's with that cheering? It's even louder than when you
raced...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's loud indeed. However good a race I ran, it was merely a debut. It
pales in comparison to the main event.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Do not underestimate others, Brian. There are racers here far greater
than me.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for the main race of the day! Among all these amazing
athletes, who will break ahead and achieve glory?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Who do you think will win this race?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: To be honest, I don't care. All I want is to race you—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I think it will be her.

text_block_list.name: Senior Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Hraaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Wait, that voice...

text_block_list.name: Senior Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
That was no win! I should never... have gone up against a beast like
that!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You're kidding me. She was nothing like this when I raced her. She
didn't even have the drive to win!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
She told me something... "I don't care how far ahead Brian is—I'll
defeat her." She even started training from scratch to face you again
one day.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: But she said she's going to win this race first.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
This is the Twinkle Series, Brian. Everyone here struggles until the
very end to achieve a spot at the top.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
This world is where you belong. But you've yet to take your first step
into it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
When you do, I'll be there waiting—at the pinnacle of racing, the G1
level.

I swallow and make an audible gulp, but the sound is completely
drowned out...
Wooooo!

The applause at the Twinkle Series grows even louder, with an energy
great enough to capture Narita Brian's attention.
choice_data_list: Do you want to race here?
Do you want to race here?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Damn right, I do! Tch!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm changing the terms of your promise. You can keep being a trainer,
but on one condition...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Be my trainer... And get me to the Twinkle Series!
A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Brian... What race are you goin' for next?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Why? It's got nothing to do with you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it does, you jerk. I'm gonna put myself through special training just for that day. And I'm gonna crush you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You know what one-on-one means? We race until one of us drops.
And I ain't on the ground yet, so don't you dare back out now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
choice_data_list:
Something tells me she's going to get a lot
better.

Something tells me she's going to get a lot
better.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Haha! I get it now—I really was underestimating people. So this is
what Tracen is all about.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It'll do. I'll stay so I can shred every last one of them. Let's get to it,
Trainer!
